    <item>
        <guid>nba527107</guid>
        <title>Ousmane Dieng: Logs career highs in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/ousmane-dieng-5695</link>
        <description>Dieng finished Wednesday's 119-113 loss to the Rockets with 36 points (15-31 FG, 1-7 3Pt, 5-5 FT), 10 assists, seven rebounds and one steal across 45 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 01 Apr 2026 9:43:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527106</guid>
        <title>Karl-Anthony Towns: Triple-doubles in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/karl-anthony-towns-3741</link>
        <description>Towns notched 20 points (8-12 FG, 4-5 FT), 11 rebounds, 11 assists and one block across 29 minutes in Wednesday's win over the Grizzlies.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 01 Apr 2026 9:31:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527105</guid>
        <title>Jaylen Brown: Drops 43 points in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jaylen-brown-3894</link>
        <description>Brown supplied 43 points (17-29 FG, 4-10 3Pt, 5-7 FT), seven assists and three rebounds across 37 minutes in Wednesday's 147-129 win over the Heat.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 01 Apr 2026 9:17:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527104</guid>
        <title>Jayson Tatum: Triple-doubles in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jayson-tatum-4108</link>
        <description>Tatum tallied 25 points (9-21 FG, 4-13 3Pt, 3-4 FT), 18 rebounds, 11 assists and two steals across 37 minutes in Wednesday's 147-129 win over the Heat.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 01 Apr 2026 9:08:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527100</guid>
        <title>Tim Hardaway: Doesn't return vs. Utah</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/tim-hardaway-3459</link>
        <description>Hardaway exited Wednesday's 130-117 win over the Jazz in the second quarter due to left knee soreness and did not return, finishing with three points (1-2 FG, 1-2 3Pt) and one rebound in 10 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 01 Apr 2026 8:34:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
